    <title>Elevated errors for multiple models</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>16</var>, <var data-var='time'>20:07</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Update</strong> - We are continuing to work to resolve issues resulting in elevated errors on requests to some Anthropic models. We will provide additional updates as soon as possible. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>16</var>, <var data-var='time'>19:14</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Identified</strong> - We have identified the cause of elevated errors on requests to multiple models, and are working to resolve this issue. We will provide an update as soon as possible. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>16</var>, <var data-var='time'>18:36</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are investigating elevated errors on requests to multiple models. We will provide an update as soon as possible. </p></content>
